subject: tips for using particles picked in external programs in WarpTools
body:
Hi all,

I had a question about using particles from external programs from Sheena 
Vasquez over on image.sc - copying here as it might be of interest to 
people on this list

https://forum.image.sc/t/how-to-extract-particles-from-warp-2-0-tomograms-that-were-picked-using-external-programs/109659

Cheers,

Alister
